status.next_allowed_action: Implement phase-3 task 3.1 after verified phase-2 completion

decision_log.reason: The work spans project dependency migration, backend event protocol, frontend state model, UI components, browser QA, and docs.

decision_log.decision: Upgrade project-internal pi-agent dependency instead of only wrapping old start/end events
decision_log.reason: The user explicitly requested alignment with newer omp event behavior and rejected MVP thinking.

decision_log.decision: Place the live tool runway inside the current assistant reply before body text
decision_log.reason: The user selected visual direction A.

decision_log.decision: Run an isolated Node probe before formal pi-agent dependency migration
decision_log.reason: The target @oh-my-pi package may be Bun-oriented or a deeper runtime migration rather than a direct dependency bump.

decision_log.decision: Use a schema-versioned shared Tool Status contract with backend/frontend fixture reuse
decision_log.reason: The backend and frontend must not silently drift on streamed event fields.

decision_log.decision: Treat stop, disconnect, and abort as first-class cancellation paths
decision_log.reason: The UI must not show a fake running state after the user stops a response, and the backend must clean up current work.

decision_log.decision: Coalesce rapid tool updates and cap long history summaries
decision_log.reason: OMP-like quality requires smooth rendering during long tool runs, not just raw event display.

decision_log.decision: Add request ownership, ordered writing, prompt concurrency guard, backend redaction, best-effort legacy history, and deterministic fake event QA
decision_log.reason: Codex outside voice identified these as the main ways the dynamic runway could look right but behave unreliably.

decision_log.decision: Use @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent, @earendil-works/pi-agent-core, and @earendil-works/pi-ai 0.79.4 as the project migration target; do not directly migrate the workbench backend to @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent 15.13.3 in phase 1.2
decision_log.reason: The current project already uses the @earendil-works package family at 0.75.5, npm latest is 0.79.4 with Node-compatible dist exports and tool_execution_update support, while the isolated @oh-my-pi 15.13.3 probe failed under Node 22 because its package exports TypeScript source and imports the Bun-only package 'bun'. Global omp 15.5.2 remains only a reference sample.
decision_log.source: phase-1 task 1.1 npm metadata and isolated Node probes

phases.goal: Migrate and verify project-internal pi-agent dependency capability

acceptance.check: Project dependency target and package-name decision recorded in decision_log
evidence: npm view @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent @0.79.4 metadata: latest=0.79.4, exports import ./dist/index.js, depends on @earendil-works/pi-agent-core ^0.79.4 and @earendil-works/pi-ai ^0.79.4.
npm view @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent @15.13.3 metadata: latest=15.13.3, exports import ./src/index.ts; global omp is 15.5.2 and installed from @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent.
Decision recorded in decision_log: target @earendil-works package family 0.79.4; @oh-my-pi 15.13.3 direct migration rejected for Node backend phase 1.2.

acceptance.check: Isolated Node probe proves the target pi-agent SDK can be imported, can create a minimal session, and exposes usable tool start/update/end event fields before project dependency migration begins
evidence: Temporary directory /tmp/llm-wiki-earendil-probe-EIwMnx installed @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent@0.79.4, @earendil-works/pi-agent-core@0.79.4, and @earendil-works/pi-ai@0.79.4 without modifying project package files.

Node v22.22.3 import probe succeeded for @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent and listed SessionManager, createAgentSession, DefaultResourceLoader, AuthStorage, ModelRegistry, ExtensionAPI-related exports, and AgentSession.
Minimal createAgentSession probe succeeded with active custom tool probe_tool and emitted tool_execution_start, tool_execution_update, and tool_execution_end for toolCallId probe-call-1.
Observed usable fields: toolName=probe_tool, args.target=fixture.txt, args.intent=inspect, partialResult.details.phase=mid, result.details.status=ok.

acceptance.check: Dependency reconnaissance treats the target package as a possible runtime migration and verifies SessionManager, auth/model config, ResourceLoader, extensions, message types, artifacts, and abort support
evidence: SessionManager support verified from @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent 0.79.4 exports and existing project usage: create, open, continueRecent, inMemory, and list remain present.
Auth/model config support verified from 0.79.4 exports: AuthStorage, ModelRegistry, SettingsManager, and @earendil-works/pi-ai model registry helpers are importable.
ResourceLoader and extensions support verified from 0.79.4 exports: DefaultResourceLoader, createExtensionRuntime, ExtensionAPI types, customTools, and extension examples remain available.

Message types and artifact-relevant history support verified from @earendil-works/pi-agent-core 0.79.4 exports/docs: AgentMessage, toolResult messages, tool_execution_start/update/end, and structured AgentToolResult.details are present.
Abort support verified in probe: createAgentSession returned session.abort as a function; low-level Agent probe returned agent.abort as a function.

acceptance.check: Isolated probe runs in a temporary directory with recorded command, package version, Node version, and reproducible evidence without modifying project package files or node_modules
evidence: Command pattern: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/llm-wiki-earendil-probe-XXXXXX); npm init -y; npm install @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent@0.79.4 @earendil-works/pi-agent-core@0.79.4 @earendil-works/pi-ai@0.79.4; node --input-type=module <probe script>.
Recorded versions: Node v22.22.3; npm 10.9.8; @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent 0.79.4; @earendil-works/pi-agent-core 0.79.4; @earendil-works/pi-ai 0.79.4.

Negative control: /tmp/llm-wiki-pi-probe-NO7eLR with @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent@15.13.3 failed under Node 22: direct Node import cannot strip TypeScript in node_modules; tsx import then failed to resolve package 'bun'.
Project package.json, package-lock.json, and node_modules were not modified during 1.1; git status before ledger update showed only untracked .superpowers/.

acceptance.check: Browser loads http://localhost:5180/ and a basic prompt receives an assistant reply
evidence: Baseline before smoke: git log --oneline -15 exited 0 and npm run typecheck exited 0.
Cleared stale current-repo dev listeners on ports 5180 and 8787 before the final run; both ports were empty before starting.
npm run dev started the web and server workspaces; Vite reported Local http://localhost:5180/ and the backend reported listening on http://127.0.0.1:8787.
Readiness checks passed: curl http://localhost:8787/api/health returned status ok, and curl -I http://localhost:5180/ returned HTTP 200.

Browser smoke used system Google Chrome through temporary Playwright install outside the repo; http://localhost:5180/ loaded, pi-agent knowledge base was selected, deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash model was visible, and the chat input/send controls were usable.
Browser smoke sent a normal prompt and observed a new non-empty assistant reply.
Browser smoke sent a retrieval-triggering prompt and observed knowledge retrieval UI text matching 已检索到 or 当前知识库未找到相关页面; captured screenshot at /tmp/llm-wiki-omp-phase-1-3-smoke.png.
Backend dev log during the final smoke showed normal startup and no backend error output.
Stopped npm run dev with Ctrl-C and confirmed no listeners remained on ports 5180 or 8787.
npm run typecheck exited 0 after the smoke run.

phases.goal: Expose stable backend tool status events

acceptance.check: Stable tool status adapter covers start, update, end, failure, missing args, and common tool formatting
evidence: Added workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.ts with ToolStatusEventAdapter and v1 contract event types: assistant_text_delta, tool_status_start, tool_status_update, tool_status_end, tool_status_summary, assistant_done, and assistant_error.

Adapter tests cover tool_execution_start, tool_execution_update, tool_execution_end success, failed tool ending, undefined args normalized to {}, read/write/bash/search/skill formatting, and unknown targets.
Adapter tracks parallel tool calls by toolCallId; ending tool B leaves tool A running and reports remaining runningToolCount.
Adapter provides cancelActiveTools for active tools and emits cancelled endings without leaking raw paths.

acceptance.check: Backend and frontend tests share contract event fixtures so SSE event fields cannot drift silently
evidence: workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.ts exports buildToolStatusContractFixture as the shared backend contract sample for later frontend parser and history-summary tests.
workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.test.ts snapshots the fixture shape so backend field changes fail before frontend parser work proceeds.

acceptance.check: Client abort or explicit stop calls the session abort path where supported and emits cancelled tool status endings for active tools
evidence: /api/prompt now registers stream.onAbort, calls session.abort when the response has not finished, clears pending knowledge context, closes the ordered writer, and releases the prompt run registry.

ToolStatusEventAdapter.cancelAssistant emits cancelled tool_status_end events for active tools plus assistant_cancelled when the client is still writable; tool-status-events.test.ts covers active-tool cancellation and redaction.

acceptance.check: Stable event contract is schemaVersioned and every prompt event includes runId, messageId, and monotonic seq
evidence: /api/prompt now creates one ToolStatusEventAdapter per prompt run and emits assistant_text_delta, tool_status_start/update/end/summary, assistant_done, assistant_cancelled, and assistant_error as schemaVersion 1 events with runId, messageId, and seq.

API smoke against http://localhost:8787/api/prompt observed schemaVersions [1], one runId, one messageId, and monotonic seq across knowledge_search tool events, text deltas, summary, and assistant_done.

acceptance.check: /api/prompt uses a single ordered writer and same-session concurrent prompts are rejected or queued without mixed events
evidence: /api/prompt now writes agent events, knowledge-search tool events, artifact_created, assistant_done, assistant_error, and assistant_cancelled through OrderedSseWriter.
PromptRunRegistry rejects a second prompt for the same active conversation while one run owns it; tool-status-events.test.ts covers owner release and wrong-owner end safety.
ordered SSE writer test proves mixed async writes preserve call order.

acceptance.check: Backend redacts private local paths and long sensitive command targets before emitting tool status events or persisted summaries
evidence: Tool status adapter sanitizes args, partial results, results, summaries, errors, path targets, and command targets before event output.
API smoke for /api/prompt selected /Users/kangjiaqi/llm-wiki/pi-agent but observed no /Users/kangjiaqi leakage in the SSE payload; emitted path target was ~/llm-wiki/pi-agent.
tool-status-events.test.ts covers home absolute path redaction and long command truncation.

acceptance.check: node --import tsx --test workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.test.ts exits 0
evidence: node --import tsx --test workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.test.ts exited 0 with 10 passing subtests after 2.2 and 2.3.

acceptance.check: npm run typecheck --workspace=@llm-wiki-agent/server exits 0
evidence: npm run typecheck --workspace=@llm-wiki-agent/server exited 0 after adding the adapter and tests.

Added path and command redaction before events are emitted, including home directory replacement and long target truncation.
Added user-readable tool action/target formatting for read, write/edit, bash/shell/command, search/grep/find, and skill tools.
Added shared contract fixture builder for later frontend parser and history-summary tests.

verification: Read progress file and plan; current unit was phase-2 task 2.2.

Updated /api/prompt to use one OrderedSseWriter and one ToolStatusEventAdapter per prompt run.
Replaced old text_delta, tool_start, tool_end, knowledge_search_start/done/empty/error, done, and error SSE output with stable schemaVersion 1 contract events while preserving artifact_created.
Added PromptRunRegistry to reject concurrent prompts for the same active conversation instead of mixing events.
Added stream.onAbort handling that calls session.abort when supported, clears pending knowledge context, closes the writer, and releases the run owner.
Added adapter helpers and tests for manual knowledge_search lifecycle, ordered SSE writes, prompt run ownership, and assistant_cancelled/cancelled active tools.

tasks.title: Preserve history display through generated summaries
verification: Read progress file and plan; current unit was phase-2 task 2.3.
Ran git log --oneline -15 and npm run typecheck before new work; both exited 0.
Updated piMessagesToUIMessages to generate completed history tool summaries from assistant toolCall blocks and matching toolResult messages.
Historical summaries are regenerated from pi session messages on every load, so new-session summaries persist after refresh without adding a new stored field.
Old incomplete tool calls with missing ids, args, targets, results, or errors fall back to best-effort labels such as 历史工具调用：bash and do not invent unavailable details.
Assistant messages without tool calls continue to return an empty tools array.
Added conversations.test.ts covering tool-call result summaries, incomplete old tool calls, no-tool messages, and missing-detail failures.
Verified node --import tsx --test workbench/server/src/conversations.test.ts exited 0 with 4 passing subtests.
Verified node --import tsx --test workbench/server/src/tool-status-events.test.ts workbench/server/src/retrieval.test.ts exited 0 with 19 passing subtests.
Verified npm run typecheck --workspace=@llm-wiki-agent/server exited 0.
Verified npm run typecheck exited 0.
Verified git diff --check exited 0.
